reviews.review_title: Not engineered for couch or limited move
reviews.review_description:
Trying this at ~30° on a sofa chair with a halo head strap and extra battery at the back. That means head movement is extremely limited. Yet the app's UI has overlooked or insufficiently catered for this obvious accessibility need. Text to the left or right is cut off in half, unreadable. Further examples are constellation info being so far down the space, my neck had to be held at a painful right angle to my body. It's not thought through.
Rockets randomly miss targets by a mile. And if you JUST want star info it's an awkward UX process.
The "many new dreams" they promise have yet to materialise.
The app is overly juvenile. I don't think the demographics of Quest VR users are all 8 year old.
It has some originality but needs some big improvement.

I forgot how much I enjoy this app until I started using it again. I love the fishing 🎣 mode. Some of the stories made me shed a tear, kind of cleansing. I feel like there should be a little bit more to the app though.  Thank you 🙏🏽
such a great game, it helps me relax before bed ☺️☺️ can’t wait for more updates!!!! the fishing minigame is so cuteeee

I'm not really sure what anyone making games for the Quest really thinks, but please make the graphics better. This over cartoony boxy style is getting so old and lazy. 
The app isn't worth $10 imo. The menu is buggy, doesn't appear straight, and the constellations keep getting in the way of the words. 
The pond, a lovely idea, the audio messages are too quiet and the music too loud. Which is more of a testament to the Quest's microphone, but there should be an option to increase the speaking volume. 

I will be requesting a refund of this app. Maybe some time in the future I'll try again, but as for right now its not worth the money.
I join codes cant find any one
This is a fantastic start but where are the updates and more content?  Keep going and this could be really really good.

reviews.review_title: I wanted to give this five stars…
reviews.review_description:
But there haven’t been any updates since this has come out that are major or noticeable. Really
Loved this when it first came out but all the experiences are now dated. I used this as part of my sleep routine for quite some time but due to there
being no new content the effectiveness has run out. 

Hope these devs inject some new life into this some day!

reviews.review_title: Has a lot of potential but has AI "art"
reviews.review_description: It’s a really relaxing app which I couldn’t help but fall in love with. The bedtime stort part uses AI generated pictures which are extremely off putting. I hope that the dev commissions original artwork from a real artist so that it’s cohesive.

reviews.review_title: It's Tranquil to Stare Up at a Pond
reviews.review_description:
So my favorite mode is the fishing memory pond where you can fish for other's recorded memories and release the fish to swim. Some nights, I just listen to the water movement and fall asleep with my headset on. 

Say devs, I have 2 issues 
#1. My fish recorder ball isn't pick-upable 5/10 times. It just graphic glitch even though I have a bright light next to my bed.

#2. The stars constellation readings are unclear because all the static in between.

reviews.review_title: One of my most enjoyable apps !!
reviews.review_description: There is I believe 5 different things you can do in this app so far , fishing in your ceiling is one of my most favorite, as you fish it’s so tranquil and relaxing however you also are catching other peoples fishes that, have their voices recorded , as a question is popped up on your ceiling in the water ! Then you can listen to their answers , and even answer back if you want too! I think that is such a sweet awesome idea !!   There is constellations you can view , they briefly tell you about them too! There’s three more neat things that I just am drawling a blank on right now lol but I know they’re really neat too!  I do hope more content is added !! This is such a neat app and unique way to relax ! Oh ! I remember now haha , one other is a nice meditation one !   Overall, this is a great way to relax and enjoy yourself , highly HIGHLY recommended !!!

I took a chance with this one and I'm so glad I did. It was such a nice experience being able to lay down and be amoung the stars, playing music with them. But the real "star" of the show was the fishing. I got to fish from the ceiling and hear other people's recordings which brought me to tears. It was like little windows into other people's souls. You can only hear each recording once, which made them more precious and made me listen more carefully. Having the option to record my own and send it out for others to hear is wonderful. I feel like my review can't possibly do it justice, it's something that simply has to be experienced yourself. 

This game was a hidden gem that caught me completely by surprise. 5 stars isn't enough.

Good game all around works well A++++ Question is there a way to play the game in a upright position? (CHEAT THIS PROGRAM TO UPRIGHT POSITION) A upgrade ADD ON. REASON HEAD BATTERY GETS IN WAY OF USE. (SITTING POSITION)

Awesome game, I'm waiting for some expansions. The potential is very big.
How to unlock extra questions for fishing. There are two of the same ones every day.
Was promised that the game would receive content and more content... there's nothing new. They literally forgot about this game.

I've owned this app for all of 45 minutes, and I was so moved by my experience, I had to rate it right away! Here is how it went down.

I was intrigued by this game since it launched, but I had been sitting on it for a while, now. I finally bit the bullet when I saw it available for 30% Off, so I dove right in. 

After a calming fishing experience about a time I stepped out of my comfort zone, I decided to check out the storyteller experience.

I chose genre(I can't recall the selection, but it wasn't kids), the characters (memes), and the setting (fantasy).

Y'all, I never thought a story about Harambe the Gorilla( my character) and Doge would lead me to tears over discussing life, and how they continue to live on as memes, despite the animals they were inspired by (cause remember, they're memes) have been gone from this world for some time. 

As Harambe, I comforted him, saying that though our physical forms may no longer be of this world, our legacy lives on through our meme status. 

I had to stop after that because I was so moved by the story, how it brought a sentimental side to the memes we laugh at every day...

For $10, this app is more than worth the price of admission, considering the emotional trip it took me on for my first ride, and since the app updates every day with a new set of experiences, there's always something to look forward to.

The fishing dream brought me to tears. Listening to other people's experiences, from small children to elders, was worth the entire purchase price. Star gazing was also fun. I enjoyed learning new things about the constellations. 

I, personally, feel the meditation is good for those who like that kind of vibe. The story telling was nice as well, but I closed out of it before the story finished. I prefer a more modern, fast-paced, straightforward narration. 

Overall, I am extremely happy with my purchase and will definitely be playing it every time I use my oculus.

I downloaded this as it seemed a fun inexpensive app, and it is, graphics are great, concept is great, I look forward to more games on it. 
My only gripe and hence the 4 stars is on listening to the quotes in the fishing game from other users I came across an America lady who thanked god for her being, her life and coming into her life etc.

As an English complete atheist it just made me want to turn the app off, maybe a filter? 
Each to their own but I’d rather not have to have religion forced upon me.
The best VR game I have ever tried

Is simply so relaxing as it is beautiful. I live on the top floor of my building, so when de ceiling of my room opened, allowing me to see the sky full of constellations it was just magical, I wasn’t expected that. It reminded me of when I was a child and used to go to the park with my brother and my father, I used to lie on the bench and watch the stars, I was doing it again but on my bed, how amazing is that!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the thoughtful review <3

reviews.review_description: Almost everything is AI generated, from the art to the voice. Very low effort and the result is trippy, uncanny visuals that are terrible to fall asleep to.

developer_response.body: Hey, Jangoon, this is not true. Everything in our stargazing experience is hand-made as well as our fishing experience.  Please reconsider your rating, there was a lot of love put into the app, but we understand we could still have better environments!

reviews.review_description: Supposed to be relaxing but actually quite frustrating. Tried over & over to throw fish back in the pond - turned into vigorous action trying to get those suckers back in there - nope. They just kept flopping back down. Also, you have to play with the lights on, so while you’re in bed lying down, it’s not really conducive to easing you into rest or sleep - the MR shows your room all lit up.

developer_response.body:
Hey, H20color! Thanks for the feedback with the fish physics, we'll try to soften it up so it's a bit easier to throw back!

Also, we'll be adding a dark mode soon to the app so you can get nice and cozy in the dark in MR. Hopefully that'll be enough to encourage you to bump up your rating <3

reviews.review_description: OMG! When I have a hard day I can relax to Pillow. I love it, but I hope that you add more stories and activities. Keep doing an amazing job!

developer_response.body: We're working on it! Thanks for the positive review <3

reviews.review_description:
I’m not a huge fan of the Stargazing or meditation but that’s just due to personal preferences. (Too many actions required for stargazing so not relaxing and I’m just not a meditator as I have ADHD). 

However I love the fishing and the story books. The fishing calms me right down as it makes you think of something special, is really relaxing and you get to hear real people’s stories too. It’s so nice. The story I read was really cute too. The voice is soft and calming, the images are beautiful and the backgrounds showing the scenes are really cute too. I felt very immersed in the story. I’m 25 and although the story would be suitable for children, it wasn’t too childish for me. 

I hope they continue to add more features to the app as it’s really nice so far but I worry that I’ll have done everything available soon and finished all of the stories and run out of things to do. Definitely worth buying now that it’s on offer though!

Also just to add that I’m playing on Meta Quest 2 and it’s fine. Of course it would look a lot better on the 3 because of the coloured camera but it’s still good enough without it. It’s a relaxing app anyway so darkness is fine.

developer_response.body: We're adding a MAJOR Quest 2 update this week that makes the passthrough look AWESOME! Be on the lookout for it this weekend :D

reviews.review_description:
Updating my score because the dev is working on a fix. I will evaluate the fix when it comes out to see if it actually makes the game payable and readjust the score accordingly.
--------------------------------
The main reason I bought the MQ3 was for using in bed, so I didn't hesitate to buy this game. What were they thinking, the devs got this ALL WRONG!!! An app for lying in bed to fall asleep should not be MR. I don't know about you, but when I go to bed, I turn off all the lights and lay in the dark. It is how most people sleep. So why would an app just for that make you lay in bed and stare at your fully lit room which is required for the device to see your hands. I actually thought the game was broken and the passthrough was stuck on.

Turn off the pass through and give us a fully immersive dark VR!! When I want to gaze at stars, I want them all around me, whether I look left right or even down underneath me. It is stupid to force people trying to relax and fall asleep, to be placed in their fully lit bedroom. At the very least it should be a VR room that looks cozy and relaxing. not my ugly, white, drywall, suburbian room. I am trying to escape that. LOL. Leave MR for daytime games.

This is unusable for me at this point, which is disappointing. I am going back to sleep watching some full immersion videos or maybe some other full immersion adventure game to help me fall asleep.

developer_response.body: Hey, Zeusvh! Happy to say that we updated the app with your request, it's all live! :D

reviews.review_description: I love the interactive stories. I wish there were more of them but hopefully they will add them in DLC or an update. The interactive stories remind me of some of the stories that my mother would read to me.

developer_response.body: Hey, Gribner. We're working on a major update for the stories in the coming month or two. We'll let you know - thanks for the nice review <3

reviews.review_description: I love this game so far, I've only played the star gazing and love it, I love that you can shoot rockets into the stars, and I love that you learn about the stars Greek mythology wise, definitely will be trying the others when I get the chance

developer_response.body: Thanks, Jessie! Really appreciate the review. Can't wait for you to see our next update next week! :)

reviews.review_description:
It did not relax me one bit. Stupid app.


reply to answer:

If it doesnt relax me, it doesnt relax me. What MORE do you want? I understand the hard work, and I respect that. But it doesnt do anything relaxing in my opinion.

developer_response.body: Hey, Bloodcurdlinger, thanks for the feedback -  I'd love to understand what you didn't like about the app - please feel free to send me an e-mail at lucas@pillow.social and reconsider your rating if you can, we put a lot of work in it!

reviews.review_description: I used to have some issues with the app but after the latest update things are running a lot more smoothly. The developer really cares about this and it’s making it better every day. Recommend it for that alone. Experiences are really interesting too!

developer_response.body: We're glad you enjoyed the latest update, Jackie! Thanks for the thoughtful review.

reviews.review_description:
Loads up fine. Get to the spot that says to lie down, so I do. The graphics are too low and fade out, so I can't really see...anything. I managed to cheat it to see what I was supposed to do. There's a start bubble, but the only thing I can do is pick it up and throw it. It doesn't actually start, and there's nothing else for me to do.
Disappointed.

developer_response.body:
Hey, Applethini. It sounds like you are exiting the boundary of your guardian, which causes things to fade out. You really need to do the Virtual Room setup for this one!

As for the start issue, to start you need to place the start hat on the Sheep like shown in the trailer! We're working on an update that makes this clearer right now. Please consider bumping up our rating when you get to start the app and sorry about the issues you've faced! We're a small team and working hard on them.

reviews.review_description: it's like the matrix but for lazy people

developer_response.body: It's like Wall-E but good for you

reviews.review_title: It's an app, not a game!
reviews.review_description:
First of all: this is my favorite app on the store. And I say app because even though it feels a lot like a game sometimes, this is the mindset you have to bring when buying it and playing it! It’s made to be used every day and it’s made to be relaxing. You won’t be running around your room, you will be relaxing in bed! So if that’s what you are looking for, you will be as happy with this purchase as I was!

Note to the creator: please add more experiences! The initial 4 are great but I Want more! :D

developer_response.body: Thanks for the thoughtful review, Choi! And yes, we're an app with game-elements, not a game :)

reviews.review_description: There’s nothing like this on the Quest right now and this is the start of something really promising. Love the choose your own adventure stories and Fishing, although I really wish I could do more than a single pond per day!

developer_response.body: Thanks for appreciating what we're trying to do, Katie! And for the feedback too! We're working on extending the Fishing experience as we speak!

reviews.review_description: Please support spanish please! My English is not so good but I like it very much !

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5 star review, Maya! We hope to support new languages soon at some point this year!

reviews.review_description: Never thought I’d be fishing from my bed under my bedsheets!

developer_response.body: Everyone should be trying to using Pillow covered in blankets! Thanks for the review, Gina!

reviews.review_title: Mixed Reality in Bed is Awesome
reviews.review_description: Fell asleep using this app and had alotta fun!

developer_response.body: Thanks, Clair! We like it too :)

reviews.review_description: It's ok but I found the music is little too loud and there no real way to adjust anything and the fishing game you can't hear any of the audio recordings.

developer_response.body: Hey, zerobytes00! We're working on volume controls for the app right now and have just done a pass normalizing all of the audio messages in our servers - thanks for the feedback and please consider upping the rating if you can <3

reviews.review_description: The visualizations are impressive. You feel like you're in a dream but you're awake.

developer_response.body: Thanks, LuckyNema! That's the idea :D

reviews.review_title: If only there were more apps like this..
reviews.review_description: Love this app. Needs polish but price is fair, can’t wait for the updates.

developer_response.body: We're getting Pillow more polished with every update! Thanks, Jay, and can't wait for you to see what's next!

reviews.review_description: It's so nice to have a place to just lay back and relax. The pond is such a unique way to interact. I'm excited to see where this goes as it continues to develop

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the thoughtful review <3 I really appreciate it.

Hope you enjoy all the free new updates we have coming up for it!

- Lucas

reviews.review_description:
This app is one of the most amazing apps I’ve ever seen! The developers put incredible work and effort into this app to make it the perfect relax app. The fishing option is one of my favorite parts of it! I cannot wait for any updates to come out. If I could give this app 100 stars, I would! 
Suggestion: It would be cool if you could have your fish give a name and location of the recorder so we could see where these recordings come from. 

I love this app and want to thank the developers for making it. Great job on this! Please keep up the great work!

Update: I noticed today that the first 2 times I tried to throw the first fish back into the pond, it just swam around my room. It never went back into the pond. Maybe this is a glitch that can be fixed. Otherwise, I still love it!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the thoughtful review <3 I really appreciate it. Just pushed a fix for the issue you mentioned!

Hope you enjoy all the free new updates we have coming up for it!

- Lucas
